resultList.dtldesc: This sophisticated 3 BHK apartment is located in the prestigious Puri Diplomatic Residences in Sector 111, Gurgaon. Situated along the high-growth Dwarka Expressway, this property offers a refined urban lifestyle, making it an exceptional choice for families and professionals seeking a combination of luxury, comfort, and strategic connectivity in the National Capital Region.Property SpecificationsThe residence spans a generous super built-up area of 2100 sq. ft. and is designed with a focus on modern elegance and spaciousness.
